description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/thkoch/hakyll-docker-image/hakyll-docker-image-compile-lts-12.22:latest and sets the variable STACK_RESOLVER to lts-12.22. Define a before_script that runs `stack --resolver $STACK_RESOLVER build`. Add a build job (default stage) that runs on all branches except master, executes `stack --resolver $STACK_RESOLVER exec -- site build`, and inherits the before_script. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, runs the same `stack --resolver $STACK_RESOLVER exec -- site build` command, and publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
